# Phase-16 — Domain-Specific & Frontier Data Platforms

> Apply architecture to IoT, robotics, autonomy, space, and geospatial domains.
>
> Suggested timeline: **Weeks 57-60**

Each prompt below instructs GitHub Copilot to generate exactly one standalone Markdown
chapter with all 50 mandatory sections (Azure-primary, ~60/30/10 Azure/OSS/AWS+GCP).

| # | Prompt | Generates | Study time |
|---|--------|-----------|------------|
| 01 | [IoT Data Platforms](01_IoT_Data_Platforms.prompt.md) | `IoT_Data_Platforms.md` | 60 min + 4h |
| 02 | [Industrial IoT (IIoT)](02_Industrial_IoT_IIoT.prompt.md) | `Industrial_IoT.md` | 60 min + 4h |
| 03 | [Robotics and ROS2](03_Robotics_and_ROS2.prompt.md) | `Robotics_and_ROS2.md` | 60 min + 4h |
| 04 | [Autonomous Vehicles Data](04_Autonomous_Vehicles_Data.prompt.md) | `Autonomous_Vehicles_Data.md` | 60 min + 4h |
| 05 | [Space Data Platforms](05_Space_Data_Platforms.prompt.md) | `Space_Data_Platforms.md` | 60 min + 3h |
| 06 | [Earth Observation and Geospatial Analytics](06_Earth_Observation_and_Geospatial_Analytics.prompt.md) | `Earth_Observation_and_Geospatial.md` | 60 min + 4h |
| 07 | [Digital Twins](07_Digital_Twins.prompt.md) | `Digital_Twins.md` | 60 min + 3h |

## How to run
Open a prompt file in VS Code and run it with GitHub Copilot (agent mode), or reference it
from Copilot Chat. It will produce the corresponding `.md` chapter listed above.
